case_title: MARILES, B. SUSANA VS MORA ARCHITECTS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MORA ARCHITECTS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARILES, B. SUSANA AS TO DEFENDANT MORA ARCHITECTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARILES, B. SUSANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORA ARCHITECTS $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $52.00, FINDINGS: $7400 CONTRACT ENTERED MAY 2001 WITH A $2000 CREDIT TO PLFT. AMENDED DOWN PAYMENT TO $7000 CONTRACT 9/26/02 WITH CREDIT OF $2000. PLFT PAID ADDITIONAL $2000 10/12/02 & $1000 1/30/03. THEREFORE PLFT PAID & CREDITS TOTAL $5000 ON $7000 AGREEMENT. PLFT TO PAY REMAINING $2000 WHEN COMPLETED PLANS & DRWAING APPROVED BY CITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MORA ARCHITECTS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27453, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARILES, B. SUSANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORA ARCHITECTS PLEASE SEE ATTACHED JUDGMENT FROM APPEAL DIVISION. JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED IN SCA 27453 ON 1/28/04 NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
